entries.name: Improved Flash Heal
entries.desc: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

entries.name: Angelic Feather
entries.desc: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

entries.name: Mind Blast
entries.desc: Blast the target's mind for 299 Shadow damage. Costs a high amount of mana.

entries.name: Holy Nova
entries.desc: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to 152 Holy damage to enemies and up to 122 healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

entries.name: Dispel Magic
entries.desc: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

entries.name: Spiritual Guidance
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

entries.name: Psychic Scream
entries.desc: Lets out a psychic scream, causing all enemies within 8 yards to flee, disorienting them for 8 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Lightburst
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 sec.

entries.name: Leap of Faith
entries.desc: Pulls the spirit of a party or raid member, instantly moving them directly in front of you.

entries.name: Improved Purify
entries.desc: Purify additionally removes all Disease effects.

entries.name: Power Infusion
entries.desc:
Infuses the target with power for 15 sec, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

entries.name: Painful Invocation
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

entries.name: Sheer Terror
entries.desc: Increases the amount of damage required to break your Psychic Scream by 25%.

entries.name: Petrifying Scream
entries.desc: Psychic Scream causes enemies to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

entries.name: Surge of Light
entries.desc: Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

entries.name: Body and Soul
entries.desc: Power Word: Shield and Leap of Faith increase your target's movement speed by 40% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Mass Dispel
entries.desc: Dispels magic in a 15 yard radius, removing all harmful Magic from 5 friendly targets and 1 beneficial Magic effect from 5 enemy targets. Potent enough to remove Magic that is normally undispellable.

entries.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
entries.desc:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at 100% value when used on an ally. 

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

entries.name: Strength of Resolve
entries.desc: Increases your Stamina by 6%.

entries.name: Mind Control
entries.desc: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec. Does not work versus Demonic, Undead, or Mechanical beings. Shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

entries.name: Dominate Mind
entries.desc: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

entries.name: Psychic Voice
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Psychic Scream by 10 sec.

entries.name: Void Tendrils
entries.desc: Call shadowy tendrils to constrict enemies when Psychic Scream ends, rooting them in place for 4 sec.

entries.name: Everlasting Light
entries.desc: Surge of Light occurs up to 50% more often based on your missing mana.

entries.name: Move with Grace
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Leap of Faith by 30 sec.

entries.name: Mental Agility
entries.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Purify and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

entries.name: Twin Disciplines
entries.desc: Increases the damage and healing of your Holy and Shadow spells by 2%.

entries.name: Dark Enlightenment
entries.desc: Increases your haste by 3%.

entries.name: False Autonomy
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Mind Control and Dominate Mind against enemy creatures by 15 sec.

entries.name: Shackle Horror
entries.desc: Shackles an aberration or undead enemy for 50 sec, preventing all actions and movement. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Inspiration
entries.desc: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 sec after a critical heal with Flash Heal or Penance.

entries.name: Binding Heals
entries.desc: 20% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

entries.name: Shadow Word: Death
entries.desc:
A word of dark binding that inflicts 320 Shadow damage to your target. If your target is not killed by Shadow Word: Death, you take backlash damage equal to 5% of your maximum health.

Damage increased by 150% to targets below 20% health.

entries.name: Sanguine Teachings
entries.desc: Increases your Leech by 2%.

entries.name: Desperate Prayer
entries.desc: Increases maximum health by 25% for 10 sec, and instantly heals you for that amount.

entries.name: Twist of Fate
entries.desc: After damaging or healing a target below 35% health, gain 5% increased damage and healing for 8 sec.

entries.name: Tithe Evasion
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

entries.name: Fade
entries.desc: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 sec.

entries.name: Angel's Mercy
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by 20 sec.

entries.name: Protective Light
entries.desc: Casting Flash Heal on yourself reduces all damage you take by 10% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Mindpierce
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Smite by 15%.

entries.name: Spectral Illusion
entries.desc: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 sec, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

entries.name: Improved Fade
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fade by 5 sec.

entries.name: Light's Inspiration
entries.desc: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by 10%.

entries.name: Unwavering Will
entries.desc: While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal, Prayer of Healing, and Smite are reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Spell Warding
entries.desc: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Phantasm
entries.desc: Activating Fade removes all snare effects.

entries.name: Angelic Bulwark
entries.desc: When an attack brings you below 30% health, you gain an absorption shield equal to 25% of your maximum health for 20 sec. Cannot occur more than once every 90 sec.

entries.name: Benevolence
entries.desc: Increases the healing of your spells by 3%.

entries.name: Focused Power
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

entries.name: Phantom Reach
entries.desc: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

entries.name: Translucent Image
entries.desc: Fade reduces damage you take by 10%.

entries.name: Atonement
entries.desc:
Power Word: Shield, Flash Heal, Plea, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance apply Atonement to your target for 15 sec.

Your spell damage heals all targets affected by Atonement for 30% of the damage done. Healing is reduced when healing more than 5 targets.

entries.name: Power Word: Radiance
entries.desc: A burst of light heals the target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for 2,152, and applies Atonement for 60% of its normal duration.

entries.name: Pain Suppression
entries.desc: Reduces all damage taken by a friendly target by 40% for 8 sec. Castable while stunned.

entries.name: Power of the Dark Side
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Pain has a chance to empower your next Penance with Shadow, increasing its effectiveness by 30%.

entries.name: Light's Promise
entries.desc: Power Word: Radiance gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Sanctuary
entries.desc: Smite prevents the next 684 damage dealt by the enemy.

entries.name: Pain Transformation
entries.desc: Pain Suppression also heals your target for 15% of their maximum health and applies Atonement.

entries.name: Protector of the Frail
entries.desc:
Pain Suppression gains an additional charge.

Power Word: Shield reduces the cooldown of Pain Suppression by 3 sec.

entries.name: Dark Indulgence
entries.desc: Mind Blast has a 100% chance to grant Power of the Dark Side and deals 20% additional damage.

entries.name: Encroaching Shadows
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Pain Spreads to a nearby enemy when you cast Penance on the target.

entries.name: Bright Pupil
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Power Word: Radiance by 3 sec.

entries.name: Enduring Luminescence
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Power Word: Radiance by 30% and causes it to apply Atonement at an additional 10% of its normal duration.

entries.name: Shield Discipline
entries.desc: When your Power Word: Shield is completely absorbed, you restore 0.5% of your maximum mana.

entries.name: Ultimate Penitence
entries.desc:
Ascend into the air and unleash a massive barrage of Penance bolts, causing 17,187 Holy damage to enemies or 39,640 healing to allies over 5.4 sec.

While ascended, gain a shield for 100% of your health. In addition, you are unaffected by knockbacks or crowd control effects.

entries.name: Power Word: Barrier
entries.desc: Summons a holy barrier to protect all allies at the target location for 10 sec, reducing all damage taken by 20% and preventing damage from delaying spellcasting.

entries.name: Painful Punishment
entries.desc: Each Penance bolt extends the duration of Shadow Word: Pain on enemies hit by 1.5 sec.

entries.name: Revel in Darkness
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Pain deals 5% additional damage and spreads to 1 additional target when you cast Penance to its target.

entries.name: Holy Ray
entries.desc: Each successive Penance bolt during a channel deals 5% increased damage and healing.

entries.name: Lenience
entries.desc: Atonement reduces damage taken by 2%.

entries.name: Shadow Tap
entries.desc: Mind Blast deals 150% increased damage, but costs 40% more mana.

entries.name: Purge the Wicked
entries.desc: Holy damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Castigation
entries.desc: Penance fires one additional bolt of holy light over its duration.

entries.name: Indemnity
entries.desc: Atonements granted by Power Word: Shield last an additional 4 sec.

entries.name: Pain and Suffering
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 8% and increases its duration by 2 sec.

entries.name: Occultist
entries.desc: Shadow damage and healing done increased by 15%.

entries.name: Harsh Discipline
entries.desc: Power Word: Radiance causes your next Penance to fire 3 additional bolts, stacking up to 2 charges.

entries.name: Evangelism
entries.desc: Immediately Power Word: Radiance your target at 150% effectiveness, and causes your next 2 casts of Power Word: Radiance to be instant cast with 40% reduced mana cost.

entries.name: Abyssal Reverie
entries.desc: Atonement heals for 10% more when activated by Shadow spells.

entries.name: Divine Procession
entries.desc: Smite extends the duration of an active Atonement by 2.0 sec.

entries.name: Inner Focus
entries.desc: Flash Heal, Power Word: Shield, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance have a 20% increased chance to critically heal.

entries.name: Archangel
entries.desc: Evangelism increases your healing and absorption effects by 15% for 18 sec.

entries.name: Mindbender
entries.desc:
Evangelism summons a Mindbender to attack a nearby target for 12 sec.

Generates 0.2% Mana each time the Mindbender attacks.

entries.name: Shadow Mend
entries.desc:
Shadow Word: Pain damage has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Shadow Mend. Stacks up to 2 charges.

 Shadow Mend:
Wraps an ally in shadows which heal for 6,788, but at a price.

The ally will take 339 damage every 1 sec, until they have taken 3,458 total damage from all sources, or leave combat.

entries.name: Shadowfiend
entries.desc:
Shadow Word: Death has a 40% chance to summon a Shadowfiend for 5 sec when damaging targets below 20% health.

 Shadowfiend
Summons a Shadowfiend to attack your target for 5 sec.

Generates 0.5% mana each time the Shadowfiend attacks.

entries.name: Greater Smite
entries.desc: Casting Smite increases the damage of Smite by 15%, stacking 2 times. Lasts 2 sec.

entries.name: Divine Aegis
entries.desc: Direct critical heals create a protective shield on the target, absorbing 30% of the amount healed. Lasts 15 sec.

entries.name: Borrowed Time
entries.desc: Casting Power Word: Shield increases your Haste by 5% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Blaze of Light
entries.desc: The damage of Smite and Penance is increased by 8%, and Penance increases or decreases your target's movement speed by 25% for 2 sec.

entries.name: Death's Torment
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Death deals damage 2 additional times at 15% effectiveness.

entries.name: Inescapable Torment
entries.desc: Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for 319 Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 sec.

entries.name: Eternal Barrier
entries.desc: Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage and lasts 5 sec longer.

entries.name: Weal and Woe
entries.desc:
Your Penance bolts increase the absorb of your next Power Word: Shield by 3%.

Stacks up to 10 times.

entries.name: Searing Light
entries.desc: Your Penance bolts sear the enemy, dealing 20% of its damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Expiation
entries.desc: Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death consume 1 sec of Shadow Word: Pain, dealing damage equal to 300% of the amount consumed.

entries.name: Master the Darkness
entries.desc:
Penance has a high chance to upgrade Power Word: Shield into Void Shield.

 Void Shield:
Shields 3 allies for 15 sec, absorbing 2,714 damage.

entries.name: Devour Matter
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing 977 extra damage to them and granting you 1% mana if a shield was present.

entries.name: Void Infusion
entries.desc: While Entropic Rift is active, Atonement healing with Void Blast and Penance is 50% more effective.

entries.name: Inner Quietus
entries.desc: Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage.

entries.name: Void Torrent
entries.desc:
Channel a torrent of void energy into the target, dealing 3,886 Shadow damage over 3 sec and tearing open an Entropic Rift.

 Entropic Rift
Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer 231 Shadow damage every 0.9 sec while within its reach.

Generates 24 Insanity over the duration.

entries.name: Quickened Pulse
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage 25% more often.

entries.name: No Escape
entries.desc: Entropic Rift slows enemies by up to 70%, increased the closer they are to its center.

entries.name: Dark Energy
entries.desc: While Entropic Rift is active, you move 20% faster.

entries.name: Collapsing Void
entries.desc:
Each time Penance damages or heals, Entropic Rift is empowered, increasing its damage and size by 10%.

After Entropic Rift ends it collapses, dealing 1,672 Shadow damage split amongst enemy targets within 15 yds.

entries.name: Void Empowerment
entries.desc: Summoning an Entropic Rift extends the duration of your 5 shortest Atonements by 1 sec.

entries.name: Darkening Horizon
entries.desc: Void Blast increases the duration of Entropic Rift by 1.0 sec, up to a maximum of 3 sec.

entries.name: Void Leech
entries.desc: Every 3 sec siphon an amount equal to 4% of your health from an ally within 40 yds if they are higher health than you.

entries.name: Embrace the Shadow
entries.desc: You absorb 3% of all magic damage taken. Absorbing Shadow damage heals you for 100% of the amount absorbed.

entries.name: Void Blast
entries.desc:
Entropic Rift upgrades Smite into Void Blast while it is active.

Void Blast:
Sends a blast of cosmic void energy at the enemy, causing 574 Shadow damage.

entries.name: Voidwraith
entries.desc:
When Entropic Rift ends, a Voidwraith is summoned from the collapsed rift for 5 sec.

Voidwraith
Summon a Voidwraith that casts Void Flay from afar. Void Flay deals bonus damage to high health enemies, up to a maximum of 50% if they are full health.

Generates 0.5% Mana each time the Voidwraith attacks.

entries.name: Overwhelming Shadows
entries.desc: Mind Blast deals 100% increased damage.

entries.name: Touch of the Void
entries.desc: Voidheart now persists for 8 sec after Entropic Rift ends.

entries.name: Voidheart
entries.desc: While Entropic Rift is active, your Atonement healing is increased by 20%.

entries.name: Entropic Rift
entries.desc: Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer 229 Shadow damage every 0.9 sec while within its reach.

entries.name: Prompt Prognosis
entries.desc: Casting Prayer of Mending heals your target for 3,572.

entries.name: Preemptive Care
entries.desc: Increases the duration of your Renew by 40%.

entries.name: Divine Feathers
entries.desc:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional 10%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted 100% of its effect.

entries.name: Save the Day
entries.desc: For 6 sec after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

entries.name: Waste No Time
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Mending by 1.5 sec.

entries.name: Guiding Light
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Twinsight
entries.desc: 3 additional Penance bolts are fired at an enemy within 40 yards when healing an ally with Penance, or fired at an ally within 40 yards when damaging an enemy with Penance.

entries.name: Foreseen Circumstances
entries.desc: Guardian Spirit lasts an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Prophet's Will
entries.desc: Your Flash Heal and Holy Word: Serenity are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

entries.name: Desperate Measures
entries.desc:
Desperate Prayer lasts an additional 10 sec.

Angelic Bulwark's absorption effect is increased by 15% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Assured Safety
entries.desc:
Casting Prayer of Mending applies Power Word: Shield to your target.

 Power Word: Shield
Shields an ally for 15 sec, absorbing 1,780 damage.

entries.name: Preventive Measures
entries.desc:
Increases the healing done by Prayer of Mending by 15%.

All damage dealt by Smite, Holy Fire and Holy Nova increased by 40%.

entries.name: Piety
entries.desc: 20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

entries.name: Unfolding Vision
entries.desc: When Power Word: Shield or Void Shield expires with absorption remaining, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 40% of its maximum absorb instead.

entries.name: Words of the Wise
entries.desc: Flash Heal, Plea, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by 15%.

entries.name: Prophet's Insight
entries.desc: Atonement healing from Holy spells is increased by 15%.
